formInstance.inputDocument:
BlueSky Innovations, founded on 2023/06/28 and currently in the Growth stage, is seeking startup funding to propel its market presence further. Under the stewardship of Matthew Combs, the business operates as a marketplace for freelancers offering digital services to small businesses and startups. The funding amount required is 4,223,226 USD, for which the company is offering 13% equity. Based on the current company valuation of 15,381,584 USD, the aims for this funding are centered on market expansion, with a particular focus on tapping into a target market of enterprises looking for enterprise-level software to automate HR processes.

The company's progress is significant, with a current monthly revenue of 500,000 USD and a robust team size of 20 dedicated professionals. BlueSky Innovations is supported by a comprehensive digital presence, including a company website at http://www.young-flores.com/ and a LinkedIn profile at https://linkedin.com/in/jose89. For further inquiries, Matthew Combs can be contacted via email at scott26@gmail.com or by phone at +1-460-036-1255x3754. With strategic investments, BlueSky Innovations is poised to scale new heights.

goldAnswers.Business Model: A marketplace for freelancers offering digital services to small businesses and startups.
goldAnswers.Target Market: Enterprises looking for enterprise-level software to automate HR processes.
goldAnswers.Additional Comments: Looking forward to scaling the business with strategic investments.
